predictedBugs: tests-review: test-plan parsing may fail if test-plan.md uses non-standard formatting (e.g., bold markers, tables instead of lists)
drift-check: Jaccard similarity threshold of 0.3 may produce false positives for short or very generic AC descriptions
actions-generate: YAML validator may flag valid multi-line string values (e.g., run: | blocks) as inconsistent indentation
edgeCases: Empty test-plan.md — parser should return no documented tests, not crash
implementation-log.jsonl with malformed JSON lines — parseImplementationLog should skip gracefully
No test files directory — findTestFiles should return empty array without errors
